name: toolchain advisor: the scaffold-dir option emits deterministic starter configs
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"aws","iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]}
JEOF
cat > req.json <<'JEOF'
{"pillars":{"integration":[{"concern":"message_queue"}],"data":[{"concern":"partitioning"}]}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff h.json --requirements req.json --scaffold-dir scaf --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
test -f scaf/argocd-application.yaml && test -f scaf/policy.rego && echo scaffolded 1>&2
